# Prompt Tape / 提示词卡带

> Seal a prompt, system prompt, or long instruction into a one-time URL that any AI agent can fetch and run. The link /c/{slug} returns plain text; /view/{slug} is the human view. Tapes last up to 7 days and carry a delete key. Public, anonymous, no account, free.

把一段提示词 / system prompt / 长指令封成一次性 URL,任何 AI agent 直接 fetch 就能照着执行,人也能看。有效期最长 7 天,带删除口令。公开匿名,无需账户,免费。

## Use it

- [Setup & usage guide](https://n78.xyz/skill): install as an MCP server or a Skill, or call the HTTP API.
- Remote MCP endpoint (Streamable HTTP, stateless): `https://n78.xyz/mcp` — tools: `create_prompt_tape`, `read_prompt_tape`, `delete_prompt_tape`. Add it to Claude, Cursor, or any MCP client with one URL.
- HTTP API: `POST https://n78.xyz/api/capsules` with `{"content":"...","source":"api"}` returns `view_url`, `url` (the raw `/c/{slug}`), `delete_token`, `expires_at`, and `agent_text`.
- Read a tape as plain text: `GET https://n78.xyz/c/{slug}`

## Limits

- `content` ≤ 16 KB. `ttl_seconds` ≤ 604800 (7 days; default 7 days).
- Create rate limit: 10 per minute per IP.
- Tapes are temporary and public. Do not seal secrets, passwords, or private data.

## Source

- Open source, MIT: https://github.com/FeilixX/prompt-capsule
